mapper.select: SELECT TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TS.WORK_CD, COUNT(1) AS TOT_CNT, SUM(PM.PAY_AMT) AS TOT_AMT FROM TR_PAYMENT PM, TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE PM.SERVICE_ID = TS.SERVICE_ID AND TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND PM.PAY_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TS.WORK_CD ORDER BY TS.COMPANY_ID, TS.WORK_CD

SELECT PM.SERVICE_ID, TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TS.CAR_NO, PM.TOTAL_AMT, PM.PAY_ST, TO_CHAR(TS.REQUEST_DT, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS REQUEST_DT FROM TR_PAYMENT PM, TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE PM.SERVICE_ID = TS.SERVICE_ID AND TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND PM.PAY_ST = 'NOTPAY' AND TS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY TS.REQUEST_DT DESC

SELECT PR.RETURN_ID, PR.SERVICE_ID, PR.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, PR.RETURN_AMT, PR.RETURN_ST, TO_CHAR(PR.REQ_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DT FROM TR_PAY_RETURN PR, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE PR.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+) AND PR.REQ_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY PR.REQ_DT DESC

SELECT IJ.INJI_ID, IJ.SERVICE_ID, IJ.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, IJ.INJI_AMT, IJ.INJI_ST, TO_CHAR(IJ.REQ_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DT FROM TR_INJISE_MANAGE IJ, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE IJ.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+) AND IJ.REQ_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY IJ.REQ_DT DESC

SELECT SERVICE_ID, PAY_KD, PAY_AMT, PAY_OP, PAY_ST, PRE_PAY_AMT, VBANK_CD, VBANK_NO, TO_CHAR (PAY_DT, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PAY_DT, T_VBANK_GB, T_VBANK_ID, REAL_ALOAN FROM TR_PAYMENT WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} ORDER BY PAY_KD
